name: DAZN: FIFA Club World Cup XR Experience

reviews.review_title: app does not load at all
reviews.review_description: very disappointing
Only for 2025. Still works for me with the replays. lt is one of the most amazing apps I've seen on Quest.
app does not work at all

The resolution is too low. I really hope you can broadcast in higher resolution, especially in 180° VR. It would also be amazing if you could add a 3D option for an even more immersive experience.

Another issue is the frequent switching of camera angles. I wish you would keep the 180° VR view focused in the middle, showing the full field throughout the game. Constantly switching to different angles—especially side views—makes it hard to follow the action. For example, you might be watching an attack, and suddenly the view changes, and you miss what’s happening.

Please consider keeping the main 180° view centered at all times, or at least offer multiple camera options for users to choose from. That way, we can pick the perspective we enjoy most.

reviews.review_title: Watching football in VR. Killer app
reviews.review_description:
I am so impressed with what DAZN has done with this app. The tabletop view for watching football is a game-changer—being able to see the entire field and every player in action adds a whole new dimension to the experience. The player models are incredibly lifelike; it almost feels like you’re watching the real thing.

Take my money. This is how I want to watch football from now on!

You can switch between classic broadcast and this wild SpyCam mode that feels like you're right there. But the real kicker? A 3D real-time view of the pitch. It’s like Football Manager and VR had a baby — and it actually works. Super smooth, super synced.

There’s still room to grow: I’d love to watch the match with friends in a shared room, toggle menus more freely, get deeper stats, and have more customization. But the core idea? 🔥

I’m giving it 4 stars for now — there’s still polish needed — but honestly, I’d give it 5 just for the concept alone.

If this tech hits La Liga and the Champions League soon… count me in every weekend.

Tabletop is my favorite way to watch sports and I’m not even a big soccer fan. I’ve wanted a motor racing XR experience like this for years so when I saw someone was doing it for another sport I had to give it a try. Honestly super good. Immersive views are not as good as xstadium but tabletop is the future. Please do more sports like this!

Feedback: Update: July 22nd, 2025

● I did notice on the farthest right side edge of my field of view, there was a weird crop. Please fix. 

● I tried but I could not watch in my Meta virtual home, only in Passthrough. Passthrough eats battery. Please allow use in Meta Environments. 

● Tabletop is now working and it is synced. You are able to watch tabletop playback of a critical moment too; goal scored, yellow/ red card ...

● To the developers; can you make the size of the player models at least %100 bigger? The tabletop player models are too tiny. 

● Please make the 180° and 360° higher picture fidelity (at least 2160P or higher). The 180° cameras should be placed at mid-field and at each goal. No need for harsh black semi-circles at the top and bottom. You can fade the edges for seamless immersion and a cleaner look. Please allow user to switch camera angles. 

                                     ~ ~ ~

I still give this app 5 stars for sure. I love DAZN. I am looking forward to boxing and other sports in the future!

Absolutely awesome... I don't even follow soccer but this experience is incredible. So far on Launch Day:
• I can have Skycam and Fieldcam both open simultaneously. 
• Both windows can be viewed in high fidelity visual quality. 
• Both windows are resizeable 
▪︎ Both windows can be positioned in your space closer or farther away.

reviews.review_title: It's great but there are no direct 180º
reviews.review_description: I have been watching the matches in this spectacular format for several days, but today I was looking forward to watching the quarterfinal matches in 180º or 360º and I find that they are not broadcasting it this way, or at least I can't find the way to do it. Does anyone know if I'm doing something wrong? Nevertheless, the app is a beastly leap forward in the way we enjoy sport! Congratulations :)

Downloaded it just for the tabletop view... while the match shows and everything, the tabletop never worked for me for the past 3 days, kept giving me temporary unavailable tabletop not syncing/working... -- After Dev replied and said it was fixed, it worked for 2 minutes and stopped again. And no, its not from my internet or connection. Im on a 5ghz router with 100mbps.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're sorry you experienced issues with the tabletop feature. We've resolved the intermittent connectivity problems that affected some users over the past few days. The tabletop view is now fully operational and all games are accessible for replay. Please give it another try - we're confident you'll have a much better experience now! – The DAZN Team

reviews.review_description: It’s Was an amazing experience to watch The CWC in VR And I can see the Tabletop Game and It’s Was a blast watching the whole game🔥
I am very surprised by this app the live picture is nice and clear and the Live table top is Awesome!
This has made an already great tournament, even better. I absolutely love it.

reviews.review_title: the app wont log me in
reviews.review_description: i keep trying to log into the app but when i try it brings up the web browser with an infinite loading screen for dazn, never using again
I love how immersed is it and how easy it is to use, bring the player n the live players right in front of me is what I been lookin for. Thanks to the app developers for making this happen

reviews.review_title: Not 180° for QF FIFA Club W Cup
reviews.review_description:
Not 180° for QF I can’t see any option about it. The 3D tabletop looks great, but I’m very interested in immersion experience.
4/7/2025

When I watched the opener, none of the game appeared on the tabletop field and it’s unclear which games are available in 180 or 360 VR.

Edit: still not fixed a week later

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for sharing your feedback, and sorry to hear the tabletop experience didn’t appear during the opening game. This has now been resolved and you will have the tabletop available for live games and replays. We also hear you on the lack of clarity around which games are available in 180° and 360°. We're actively working on improving in-app communication so it's easier to know what to expect for each game. The 180 and 360 fully immersive video will be available for the last quarter final, the semis and the final. – The DAZN Team

reviews.review_description: This is exactly the type of experience that would make me watch a game on headset instead of my TV. Love it!!

reviews.review_title: I can't log in to my account
reviews.review_description: I can't log in to my account
works well and is very cool

What a fun technology. I love the tabletop view, it's great to be able to see the entire field and view the tactics more clearly.

The 180 view is a good idea but the bit rate and resolution is too low to actually watch a full game like this. I hope they iterate on it tho
I do not know how to go into agumented reality
Absolutely incredible way to watch the club World Cup. Super immersive and feels like I’m at the stadium
